description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by blue panels on the stock, grip, and fore-end. The stock is solid and geometric, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the grip is slightly contoured for ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively short and blocky, with a squared-off muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is large and angular, offering ample space for finger placement and protection. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical style, with clean lines and a utilitarian aesthetic. The materials appear to be a combination of metal and polymer, giving the shotgun a durable and contemporary look.
description: A modern, angular shotgun with a black body and blue accents, featuring a solid stock and a large, squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the narrow muzzle and the blue-accented fore-end.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the blue stock, grip, and fore-end, as well as the angular, blocky body.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with blue accents visible on the stock.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue-accented stock, grip, and fore-end, along with the squared body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and blocky with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, angular, and squared with ample space for finger placement
